rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE BERNARD AND ALICE GICOVATE FAMILY TRUST U/A/D APRIL 27, 1995
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required on the issue of fees. No additional hearing notes will be sent. Counsel must prepare the First National Bank statement that covers 12/31/12 for filing and bring it with him to the hearing. The statement filed is dated 12/27/12, prior to the end of the account period. Counsel must also file a verification to the Declaration signed by the Trustee and bring an endorsed filed copy to the hearing.
